reason: Preserve tcrv.exec as execution/capability/variant/dispatch/fallback focused and compute-free.
Use plugin and exporter registries without tool-local target-specific branches.
Keep extension and target semantics plugin-local and target-owned.
Coherence gate must validate selected-path and variant metadata before export.
Coherence gate must cover lowering boundary, runtime ABI, emission plan, and artifact route contracts.
Legal RVV source route must remain available without adding RVV claims.
Legal scalar fallback source route must remain available.
Offload descriptor route must remain runtime-offload capability and require runtime ABI metadata.
Lit/FileCheck coverage must assert fail-closed diagnostics and no output leakage.
